common.footer: This is an automated email, please do not reply.
common.thanks: Thank you for using our service.

topup_success.subject: ✅ Top-up Successful!
topup_success.content: You have successfully topped up: {{amount}} to your EstateMarket wallet.

withdraw_otp.subject: 🔐 Withdrawal Verification Code
withdraw_otp.content: You are making a request to withdraw: {{amount}}.
withdraw_otp.footer: This code will expire in 10 minutes. Do not share this code with anyone.

password_reset.subject: 🔑 Password Reset Request
password_reset.content: You requested a password reset. Here is your OTP:
password_reset.note_2: If you didn't request this, you can ignore this email.
password_reset.note_3: Never share this code with anyone.

ban_notification.subject: ⚠️ Account Ban Notification
ban_notification.content: We regret to inform you that your account has been banned due to community policy violations.
ban_notification.appeal_text: If you believe this is a mistake, please contact our support team.

admin_withdraw.notif_content: User {{userName}} has requested to withdraw: {{amount}}.
admin_withdraw.remind_details: This request has been pending for {{hours}} hours. Please process it to avoid delays.
admin_withdraw.urgent_details: This request has been pending for {{hours}} hours and will be auto-rejected soon. Please process immediately!

withdraw_status.subject: [UPDATE] Your withdrawal request
withdraw_status.content: Your withdrawal request for {{amountFormatted}} has changed to: {{statusText}}.

appointment.sender_content: You have successfully scheduled a viewing for: "{{postTitle}}".
appointment.sender_note: The owner is reviewing your request. We will notify you once there is a response.
appointment.receiver_subject: You have a new viewing request
appointment.receiver_content: Customer {{buyerName}} wants to view your property: "{{postTitle}}".
appointment.receiver_note: Please log in to the system to APPROVE or REJECT this appointment.
appointment.update_content: The owner has responded to your viewing request for: "{{postTitle}}".
appointment.update_note_approved: Please arrange your time to meet the owner as scheduled. You can view the contact number in your profile.
appointment.update_note_rejected: Your request does not fit the owner's schedule. You can try booking at another time.
appointment.remind_seller_content: You have a viewing request from {{buyerName}} sent over 24 hours ago that hasn't been processed.
appointment.remind_buyer_content: Your viewing request is still waiting for {{sellerName}}'s response.
appointment.remind_buyer_note: We have just sent a reminder to the owner. If it's too late, you can proactively contact them via chat or phone.
appointment.remind_seller_overdue: This request was sent over 24 hours ago.
appointment.remind_seller_action: Please respond soon to avoid wasting the customer's time.

moderation.violation_content: Your post "{{postTitle}}" has been identified as violating our community policies.
moderation.violation_note: Please refer to the Posting Policy for details. Repeated violations may lead to account suspension.
moderation.user_violation_content: The system has recorded community policy violations for your account.
moderation.user_violation_note: If you continue to violate policies, your account will be Permanently Banned.

unban_notification.subject: 🔓 Your account has been unbanned
unban_notification.content: We are sending this email to inform you that the ban on your EstateMarket account has been lifted.
unban_notification.welcome_back: Welcome back! Please strictly follow the community policies to build a safe environment.

report_confirmation.subject: 📢 Report Confirmation Received
report_confirmation.content: We have received your report regarding {{type}}: "{{targetName}}".
report_confirmation.note: The admin team will review this report within 24-48 hours. We are committed to building a safe and transparent community.

patterns.topup_sepay_success_points: Top-up successful (Sepay): +{{amount}} VND. Balance: {{balance}} VND. You earned {{points}} reward points!
patterns.topup_success_points: Top-up successful: +{{amount}} VND. Balance: {{balance}} VND. You earned {{points}} reward points!
patterns.topup_first_bonus: You earned {{points}} points from your first top-up bonus!
patterns.post_earned_points: You earned {{points}} points from a new post.
patterns.post_created_success: Your post "{{title}}" has been created and is pending approval.
patterns.appointment_accepted: Your viewing request for "{{post}}" was accepted.
patterns.appointment_rejected: Your viewing request for "{{post}}" was rejected.
patterns.points_expiry_warn: You have {{points}} points expiring on {{date}}. Use them now!
patterns.lead_viewed: {{user}} viewed the phone number of post "{{post}}".
patterns.report_received: We received your report. Thank you for your contribution.
patterns.new_report_post: New report from user about post (Reason: {{reason}}).
patterns.new_report_user: New report from user about account (Reason: {{reason}}).
patterns.violation_alert: {{target}} reported for violation: {{reason}}. Please check again.

reports.error_pending_post: You have a pending report for this post
reports.error_pending_user: You have a pending report for this user
reports.error_self_report_post: You cannot report your own post
reports.error_not_edited: Post hasn't been edited since your last report. You cannot report again.

favorites.error_self_favorite: You cannot save your own post

transactions.withdraw_refund: Withdrawal refund due to rejection: {{amount}} VND

adjustment_reasons.violation_ban: Max penalty: Forfeit all points & Account ban
